Description.en: Mitigation prevents a portion of Resolve loss and scales with your Armour
Description.zh: 缓阻可以减少部分坚毅损失，并随你的护甲变化

Description.en: This scales with your Evasion Rating
Description.zh: 这会随你的闪避值变化

Description.en:
Up to 50% of Resolve loss from Enemy Hits is removed from the Aegis before Resolve or Inspiration
Aegis is broken when any Resolve is lost from Enemy Hits
Aegis is instantly restored after 4 seconds of no Resolve being lost
Resolve Aegis scales with your maximum Energy Shield
Description.zh:
在扣除坚毅和启迪前，被怪物命中所损失的坚毅最多有 50% 从护盾中扣除
被怪物命中损失坚毅后，护盾将失效
在 4 秒内没有损失坚毅后，护盾会立即恢复
坚毅护盾随你的能量护盾上限变化
